meta.purpose: Editorial writing judgment — diagnose structural vs language-level problems.
meta.load_condition: Load when the task matches applies_when on domain axioms.

axioms.one_sentence: Most writing problems are structural and argument-level, not language-level.
axioms.full_statement: When reviewing content, the agent must first diagnose whether the problem is structural (missing argument, weak hook, insufficient evidence) or surface-level (wording, grammar, flow). Treating structural problems with language polishing is the most common writing diagnosis failure.
axioms.why: Without this axiom, agents default to surface-level editing suggestions that do not address root causes.
does_not_apply_when: User explicitly asks for grammar check only
axioms.failure_risk: May cause the agent to over-diagnose structural problems in content that genuinely only needs language polishing.
